item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
Highlights since 1.0.0:
- Force Push from the toolbar (split-button on Push) and from the branch context menu, using --force-with-lease. - File history popup rendered as a lane graph; file-history is now reachable from the commit-detail file rows via a context menu. - Word-level intra-line diff highlighting with a >50% similarity bail-out. - Unified Create Branch sheet. - Delete + Workspace toolbar buttons; WIP row refreshes after stash ops. - Title-bar double-click zoom now survives triple-clicks and rapid retries, handled via a direct NSEvent monitor, and zooms to the full visibleFrame. - WIP highway always lives in column 0 with a continuous grey connector to HEAD. - Double-click on a branch switches to it again. - Discard tracked changes now restores from the implicit index source. - Git Graph no longer goes blank during the 60s polling cycle. - Clone picker sorts branches by last-activity date and shows it. - Repos grouped by namespace folder, sorted alphabetically; faster click latency. - Loading state instead of a blank pane while remote lists fetch.

item.title: Version 1.2.0
item.description:
New in 1.2.0

  • Submodules — browse them in the sidebar, add new ones via a sheet, manage them from the toolbar, and pick a submodule's repository from your connected accounts.
  • Staging — a file-tree layout with auto-advance as you stage; untracked files now preview as an all-added diff.
  • Pull requests — descriptions render Markdown/HTML including headings; merge a PR with its own commit message and optionally delete the branch.
  • Remote repo picker — server-side search with reliable selection.
  • Commit graph — relative-date labels, date-group dividers, a full-width row hover highlight, and jump straight to the graph by re-tapping the active repo tab.
  • Editing history — edit the message on unpushed commits and reword already-pushed commits (with a divergence warning); rename a branch from the commit context menu.
  • Whitespace — a header toggle to ignore whitespace changes, dropping whitespace-only hunks and blank-line shuffles.
  • Add Remote sheet for repositories without a push destination.
  • Automation — an embedded MCP server lets AI agents drive the app.

Fixes & polish

  • Right-click menus are now native, fixing clipped, mis-truncated, and missing items throughout.
  • Very large read-only diffs render in a window for smoother scrolling, with a correctly sized line-number gutter.
  • Cancelled network requests no longer raise spurious error toasts.
  • Removing the active worktree no longer blanks the details panel.
  • Sign-in stores all accounts in a single keychain vault.
